overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a dense forest at night, illuminated by a flashlight. The footage appears to be from a video game, featuring a narrow dirt trail winding between dark trees and tall grass.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark forest hiking trail illuminated by flashlight

agents.ego_description: navigating the narrow dirt path through the dense forest at night, using a flashlight to illuminate the immediate path ahead

entered.detail: narrow winding trail of packed earth and small stones cutting through the forest floor
gnarled tree trunk with twisted branches visible on the right side of the path
thick overhead cover of tree branches blocking most of the night sky
tall grass and weeds lining both edges of the trail

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily along a narrow dirt trail through a dense forest at night. A flashlight illuminates the immediate path ahead, revealing twisted tree trunks, thick undergrowth, and a canopy that blocks most of the sky above. The environment remains consistently dark and enclosed throughout the walk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a claustrophobic nocturnal forest that maintains a sense of oppressive enclosure. It begins with a steady advance along a narrow dirt trail, where a single flashlight beam cuts through the darkness to reveal the immediate path. As the camera pushes forward, the light catches the rough textures of twisted tree trunks and thick undergrowth crowding the edges of the trail. The scene remains tightly framed by a dense canopy that blocks the sky, ensuring the environment stays consistently dark and secluded as the journey continues deeper into the woods.
